name: execute_sql
description: Execute SQL against a connected database. Supports multiple statements separated by semicolons. Respects read-only mode if configured — only SELECT and other read-only statements will be permitted when enabled.

sql.description: SQL to execute (multiple statements separated by ;)

name: search_objects
description: Search and list database objects including schemas, tables, columns, stored procedures, functions, and indexes. Supports SQL LIKE pattern matching and three detail levels: names (minimal tokens), summary (with metadata), full (complete structure details).

pattern.description: LIKE pattern (% = any chars, _ = one char). Default: %

table.description: Filter to table (requires schema; column/index only)
